stem: A political polling study surveys 500 registered voters and observes 166 positive outcomes out of 500 (33.2%). Estimate the true voter support for a policy and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.332. Wilson 95% CI: [0.2921, 0.3744]. Point estimate: 0.3333.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
